title: Inazuma Eleven: Super Dimension Dream Match
original_title: イナズマイレブン超次元ドリームマッチ
overview: The movie aired on June 13th 2014 in theaters. This is the fourth movie of the Inazuma Eleven universe.  The DVD version of the movie was released on October 22, 2014.
